query:
SELECT 
  m.id,
  m.clientId,
  c.name as clientName,
  m.mealType,
  m.createdAt,
  m.aiDescription,
  m.calories,
  m.protein,
  m.carbs,
  m.fat,
  m.source
FROM meals m
LEFT JOIN clients c ON m.clientId = c.id
WHERE m.source = 'nutrition_label'
ORDER BY m.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Acm1QzHQhQUgLe.35139a5d2a11 --database CVoYWTwV8QMMBSnZsHHM3q --execute 
SELECT 
  m.id,
  m.clientId,
  c.name as clientName,
  m.mealType,
  m.createdAt,
  m.aiDescription,
  m.calories,
  m.protein,
  m.carbs,
  m.fat,
  m.source
FROM meals m
LEFT JOIN clients c ON m.clientId = c.id
WHERE m.source = 'nutrition_label'
ORDER BY m.createdAt DESC
LIMIT 20;
